overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic city at dusk. The camera travels along an elevated monorail track through a dense canyon of neon-lit skyscrapers, transitioning from sunset views to the interior of the train cabin over the course of a minute.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated monorail overlooking downtown skyline at sunset

agents.ego_description: traveling on an elevated monorail through the cyberpunk city at sunset, viewing the illuminated skyline

entered.detail: tall concrete tower with large white '03' illuminated signage
large colorful digital billboard displaying sushi advertisement with red and blue colors
vertical neon sign with glowing cyan Japanese characters
cluster of reflective glass office towers with illuminated windows
curved monorail track with concrete barriers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sweeping view of a futuristic cyberpunk city at sunset. The camera moves steadily along an elevated monorail track, showcasing the iconic tower with '03' signage and various neon advertisements against a golden-orange sky. The glass skyscrapers reflect the dying light as the journey begins.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rail curving through industrial downtown district

events.description: flying vehicle passes by in the mid-distance against the sky
camera rounds a curve revealing industrial structures and construction cranes

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated track as the view opens to reveal industrial zones and flying traffic

notable_agents.action: flying car moving horizontally across the frame in the distance

entered.detail: tall industrial structures with smoke stacks emitting white vapor
large construction cranes silhouetted against the sky
concrete support pillars and track infrastructure

segments.scene_description: The monorail curves right, moving past the iconic 03 tower which falls behind view. The scene opens to reveal industrial districts with smokestacks and construction cranes in the distance. A flying vehicle cruises past as the sun continues to set, transitioning the lighting from golden to a cooler blue.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rail passing close to neon-lit commercial towers

events.description: passing extremely close to red-striped building temporarily obscures right side of view
camera view shifts to show interior of train cabin with seated passenger

agents.ego_description: traveling past close-proximity skyscrapers with bright neon accents, ending with a view of a passenger inside the train cabin

notable_agents.action: passenger wearing a hat seated inside the train cabin visible through the window

entered.detail: tall building with distinctive vertical red neon stripes and illuminated windows
interior cabin of the monorail with seats and handrails becoming visible

segments.scene_description: The train moves through a narrower corridor of buildings, passing extremely close to a distinctive red-striped tower with vertical neon lighting. Flying vehicles continue to pass by in the distance. As the segment progresses, the camera angle shifts to reveal the train's interior, showing a seated passenger, before the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along an elevated monorail track, transitioning from a sweeping sunset vista of a futuristic city to the intimate interior of a train cabin. It begins by gliding past glass skyscrapers and neon advertisements under a golden-orange sky, with the iconic 03 tower dominating the initial view. As the track curves right, the perspective shifts away from the tower toward distant industrial districts filled with smokestacks and cranes, while the lighting cools from gold to a deep blue. The camera then enters a narrower corridor of buildings, passing closely by a red-striped tower with vertical neon lights and flying vehicles in the distance. Finally, the view pivots inward from the cityscape to reveal a seated passenger inside the train cabin.
